citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:22 PM on
5/22/2026. The inspector contacted the licensee by phone call and was informed no responsible adult was available to
conduct the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 3:22 PM on 
5/22/2026. The inspector contacted the licensee by phone call and was informed no responsible adult was available to 
conduct the inspection. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the 
AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
